name: AI News Aggregator
description: Fetches the past week of AI news from Google News, extracts article content, and generates themed markdown reports covering Compute, Energy, Economics, and Research.

skills.name: Fetch AI News
skills.description: Retrieves recent AI news articles from Google News for the past 7 days.

skills.name: Fetch Article Content
skills.description: Extracts the full text content of a news article from its URL.

skills.name: Save Themed Report
skills.description: Saves a compiled AI news report to a themed markdown file (Compute, Energy, Economics, or Research).
